arrive.vs: 强调到达终点,不含来的过程

approach.vs: 强调接近过程,常搭抽象对象

reach.vs: 强调努力或经过距离够到

place.vs: 比 put 更慎重、有意识

appear.vs: 比 seem 更基于视觉印象

speak.vs: 强调说的动作而非内容

can.vs: 侧重能力或非正式许可

might.vs: 比 may 可能性更低

could.vs: 过去式或更礼貌的请求

around.vs: 侧重 "大约" 而非 "关于"

amid.vs: 文学性强,常搭抽象事物

some.vs: 肯定句用 some,疑问用 any

tiny.vs: 比 little 更小,情感色彩

whereas.use: he likes tea, whereas I prefer coffee

in what way.use: in what way did it help?

by what means.use: by what means did they enter?

at what time.use: at what time will you arrive?

at what place.use: at what place did they meet?

at the place.use: at the place we agreed on

for what reason.use: for what reason did he leave?

at that time.use: I was a child at that time

if you would.use: if you would close the door

record.vs: 泛指任何记录,不止财务

wisdom.vs: 侧重经验积累的判断力

damaged.vs: 侧重受损不一定完全坏
